fields.label: esc period
fields.description: Default operation step duration. Must be greater than 60 seconds. Accepts seconds, time unit with suffix and user macro since => Zabbix 3.4 Required when C(state=present).

fields.label: eval type
fields.description: Filter condition evaluation method. Defaults to C(andor) if conditions are less then 2 or if I(formula) is not specified. Defaults to C(custom_expression) when formula is specified.

fields.label: event source
fields.description: Type of events that the action will handle. Required when C(state=present).

fields.label: formula
fields.description: User-defined expression to be used for evaluating conditions with a custom expression. The expression must contain IDs that reference each condition by its formulaid. The IDs used in the expression must exactly match the ones defined in the I(conditions). No condition can remain unused or omitted. Required when I(eval_type=custom_expression). Use sequential IDs that start at "A". If non-sequential IDs are used, Zabbix re-indexes them. This makes each module run notice the difference in IDs and update the action.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the action

fields.label: notify if canceled
fields.description: Weather to notify when escalation is canceled. Can be used when I(event_source=trigger).

fields.label: pause in maintenance
fields.description: Whether to pause escalation during maintenance periods or not. Can be used when I(event_source=trigger).

fields.label: pause symptoms
fields.description: Whether to pause escalation if event is a symptom event. I(supported) if C(event_source) is set to C(trigger) Works only with >= Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the action. On C(present), it will create an action if it does not exist or update the action if the associated data is different. On C(absent), it will remove the action if it exists.

fields.label: status
fields.description: Status of the action.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: authentication type
fields.description: Choose default authentication type.

fields.label: disabled usrgroup
fields.description: User group name to assign the deprovisioned user to. The user group must be disabled and cannot be enabled or deleted when configured. Required if C(ldap_jit_status) for C(saml_jit_status) enabled. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: http auth enabled
fields.description: HTTP authentication will be enabled if C(true).

fields.label: http case sensitive
fields.description: Case sensitive login for HTTP authentication will be enabled if C(true).

fields.label: http login form
fields.description: Choose default login form.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: http strip domains
fields.description: A list of domain names that should be removed from the username.

fields.label: jit provision interval
fields.description: Time interval between JIT provision requests for logged-in user. Accepts seconds and time unit with suffix with month and year support (3600s,60m,1h,1d,1M,1y). Minimum value 1h. Available only for LDAP provisioning. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: ldap auth enabled
fields.description: LDAP authentication will be enabled if C(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: ldap base dn
fields.description: Base DN of LDAP. This setting is required if current value of I(ldap_configured) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix <= 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions. Please use community.zabbix.zabbix_user_directory module instead of this parameter with Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: ldap bind dn
fields.description: Bind DN of LDAP. Works only with Zabbix <= 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions. Please use community.zabbix.zabbix_user_directory module instead of this parameter with Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: ldap bind password
fields.description: Bind password of LDAP. Works only with Zabbix <= 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions. Please use community.zabbix.zabbix_user_directory module instead of this parameter with Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: ldap case sensitive
fields.description: case sensitive login for LDAP authentication will be enabled if C(true).

fields.label: ldap configured
fields.description: LDAP authentication will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: ldap host
fields.description: LDAP server name. e.g. C(ldap://ldap.zabbix.com) This setting is required if current value of I(ldap_configured) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix <= 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions. Please use community.zabbix.zabbix_user_directory module instead of this parameter with Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: ldap jit status
fields.description: Status of LDAP provisioning. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: ldap port
fields.description: A port number of LDAP server. This setting is required if current value of I(ldap_configured) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix <= 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions. Please use community.zabbix.zabbix_user_directory module instead of this parameter with Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: ldap search attribute
fields.description: Search attribute of LDAP. This setting is required if current value of I(ldap_configured) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix <= 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions. Please use community.zabbix.zabbix_user_directory module instead of this parameter with Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: ldap userdirectory
fields.description: LDAP authentication default user directory name for user groups with gui_access set to LDAP or System default. Required to be set when C(ldap_configured) / C(ldap_auth_enabled) is set to 1.

fields.label: passwd check rules
fields.description: Checking password rules. Select multiple from C(contain_uppercase_and_lowercase_letters), C(contain_digits). C(contain_special_characters) and C(avoid_easy_to_guess). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.0.

fields.label: passwd min length
fields.description: Minimal length of password. Choose from 1-70. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.0.

fields.label: saml auth enabled
fields.description: SAML authentication will be enabled if C(true).

fields.label: saml case sensitive
fields.description: Case sensitive login for SAML authentication will be enabled if C(true).

fields.label: saml encrypt assertions
fields.description: SAML encrypt assertions will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml encrypt nameid
fields.description: SAML encrypt name ID will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml idp entityid
fields.description: SAML identify provider's entity ID. This setting is required if current value of I(saml_auth_enabled) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml jit status
fields.description: Status of SAML provisioning. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: saml nameid format
fields.description: Name identifier format of SAML service provider. Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml sign assertions
fields.description: SAML sign assertions will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml sign authn requests
fields.description: SAML sign AuthN requests will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml sign logout requests
fields.description: SAML sign logout requests will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml sign logout responses
fields.description: SAML sign logout responses will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml sign messages
fields.description: SAML sign messages will be enabled if C(true). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml slo url
fields.description: URL for SAML single logout service. Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml sp entityid
fields.description: Entity ID of SAML service provider. This setting is required if current value of I(saml_auth_enabled) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml sso url
fields.description: URL for single sign on service of SAML. This setting is required if current value of I(saml_auth_enabled) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: saml username attribute
fields.description: User name attribute of SAML. This setting is required if current value of I(saml_auth_enabled) is C(false). Works only with Zabbix = 6.0 and is silently ignored in higher versions.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: tls accept
fields.description: Type of allowed incoming connections for autoregistration. Choose from C(unsecure), C(tls_with_psk) or both.

fields.label: tls psk
fields.description: TLS connection uses this PSK value. This setting requires I(tls_accept=tls_with_psk) if current value of I(tls_accept) is C(unsecure).

fields.label: tls psk identity
fields.description: TLS connection uses this PSK identity string. The PSK identity string will be transmitted unencrypted over the network. Therefore, you should not put any sensitive information here. This setting requires I(tls_accept=tls_with_psk) if current value of I(tls_accept) is C(unsecure).

fields.label: content json
fields.description: The content of the JSON file to be imported. Mutually exclusive with I(content_xml) and I(content_yaml).

fields.label: content xml
fields.description: The content of the XML file to be imported. Mutually exclusive with I(content_json) and I(content_yaml).

fields.label: content yaml
fields.description: The content of the YAML file to be imported. Mutually exclusive with I(content_json) and I(content_xml).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: rules
fields.description: The rules for importing the configuration. Please refer to rules of the Zabbix configuration.import API documentation for more details. https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/current/en/manual/api/reference/configuration/import

fields.label: attempt interval
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0 Interval between attempts in seconds (value between 0 and 10).

fields.label: auth type
fields.description: HTTP authentication method used by the connector.

fields.label: data type
fields.description: Type of data being streamed.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the connector.

fields.label: enabled
fields.description: Whether the connector is enabled. (mapped to the I(status) property of the connector object in the Zabbix API)

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: http proxy
fields.description: HTTP(S) proxy used by the connector.

fields.label: item value types
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0 List of value types to stream. Each element should be one of C(all), C(all+bin), C(numeric_float), C(character), C(log), C(numeric_unsigned), C(text) or C(binary). C(all) represents all types except binary I((default)). C(all+bin) represents all types, binary included.

fields.label: max attempts
fields.description: Maximum number of attempts.

fields.label: max records
fields.description: Maximum number of records sent in one message.

fields.label: max senders
fields.description: Number of sender processes used by the connector.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the connector.

fields.label: ssl cert file
fields.description: Public SSL key file path for client authentication.

fields.label: ssl key file
fields.description: Private SSL key file path for client authentication.

fields.label: ssl key password
fields.description: Password of the private SSL key file.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the connector. On C(present), it will create a connector if it does not exist or update the connector if the associated data is different. On C(absent), it will remove the connector if it exists.

fields.label: tags eval type
fields.description: Tag filter evaluation method.

fields.label: token
fields.description: Bearer token to authenticate the connector with the receiver. Required when C(auth_type=bearer).

fields.label: url
fields.description: URL of the receiver used by the connector.

fields.label: verify host
fields.description: Whether the connector should verify the receiver's hostname against the certificate's CN or SAN fields.

fields.label: verify peer
fields.description: Whether the connector should verify the receiver's certificate.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of this correlation

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of this correlation

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the correlation.

fields.description: Status of the correlation.

fields.label: delay
fields.description: Execution interval of the discovery rule. Accepts seconds, time unit with suffix and user macro.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: iprange
fields.description: One or several IP ranges to check separated by commas.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the discovery rule.

fields.label: proxy
fields.description: Name of the proxy used for discovery.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Create or delete discovery rules.

fields.description: Whether the discovery rule is enabled. Possible values: enabled (default) disabled

fields.label: host name
fields.description: Name of host to add discovery rule to. Required when I(template_name) is not used. Mutually exclusive with I(template_name).

fields.description: Name of template to add discovery rule to. Required when I(host_name) is not used. Mutually exclusive with I(host_name).

fields.description: Only updates an existing macro if set to C(yes).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: macro description
fields.description: Text Description of the global macro.

fields.label: macro name
fields.description: Name of the global macro in zabbix native format C({$MACRO}) or simple format C(MACRO).

fields.label: macro type
fields.description: Type of the global macro Text or Secret Text. Required if I(state=present). text secret - Secret Text Works only with Zabbix >= 5.0 and will default to Text in lower versions vault - Vault Secret Works only with Zabbix >= 5.2 and will default to Text in lower versions

fields.label: macro value
fields.description: Value of the global macro. Required if I(state=present).

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the macro. On C(present), it will create if macro does not exist or update the macro if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove a macro if it exists.

fields.description: Name of the hostgroup in Zabbix. hostgroup is the unique identifier used and cannot be updated using this module.

fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: ca cert
fields.description: Required certificate issuer.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the host in Zabbix.

fields.label: force
fields.description: Overwrite the host configuration, even if already present.

fields.label: host groups
fields.description: List of host groups the host is part of. Make sure the Zabbix user used for Ansible can read these groups.

fields.label: host name
fields.description: Name of the host in Zabbix. I(host_name) is the unique identifier used and cannot be updated using this module.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: inventory mode
fields.description: Configure the inventory mode.

fields.label: inventory zabbix
fields.description: Add Facts for a zabbix inventory (e.g. Tag) (see example below). Please review the interface documentation for more information on the supported properties U(https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/current/en/manual/api/reference/host/object#host-inventory)

fields.label: ipmi authtype
fields.description: IPMI authentication algorithm. Please review the Host object documentation for more information on the supported properties https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/3.4/manual/api/reference/host/object Possible values are, C(0) (none), C(1) (MD2), C(2) (MD5), C(4) (straight), C(5) (OEM), C(6) (RMCP+), with -1 being the API default. Please note that the Zabbix API will treat absent settings as default when updating any of the I(ipmi_)-options; this means that if you attempt to set any of the four options individually, the rest will be reset to default values.

fields.label: ipmi password
fields.description: IPMI password. also see the last note in the I(ipmi_authtype) documentation

fields.label: ipmi privilege
fields.description: IPMI privilege level. Please review the Host object documentation for more information on the supported properties https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/3.4/manual/api/reference/host/object Possible values are C(1) (callback), C(2) (user), C(3) (operator), C(4) (admin), C(5) (OEM), with C(2) being the API default. also see the last note in the I(ipmi_authtype) documentation

fields.label: ipmi username
fields.description: IPMI username. also see the last note in the I(ipmi_authtype) documentation

fields.label: link templates
fields.description: List of templates linked to the host.

fields.label: monitored by
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Source that is used to monitor the host.

fields.label: proxy
fields.description: The name of the Zabbix proxy to be used. Required if C(monitored_by) is "proxy"

fields.label: proxy group
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Proxy group that is used to monitor the host. Required if C(monitored_by) is "proxy_group"

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the host. On C(present), it will create if host does not exist or update the host if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove a host if it exists.

fields.label: status
fields.description: Monitoring status of the host.

fields.label: tls accept
fields.description: Specifies what types of connections are allowed for incoming connections. The tls_accept parameter accepts values of 1 to 7 Possible values, 1 (no encryption), 2 (PSK), 4 (certificate). Values can be combined.

fields.label: tls connect
fields.description: Specifies what encryption to use for outgoing connections. Possible values, 1 (no encryption), 2 (PSK), 4 (certificate).

fields.label: tls psk
fields.description: PSK value is a hard to guess string of hexadecimal digits. The preshared key, at least 32 hex digits. Required if either I(tls_connect) or I(tls_accept) has PSK enabled. Using this parameter makes this module non-idempotent.

fields.label: tls psk identity
fields.description: It is a unique name by which this specific PSK is referred to by Zabbix components Do not put sensitive information in the PSK identity string, it is transmitted over the network unencrypted. Works only with >= Zabbix 3.0 Using this parameter with Zabbix >= 5.4 makes this module non-idempotent.

fields.label: tls subject
fields.description: Required certificate subject.

fields.label: visible name
fields.description: Visible name of the host in Zabbix.

fields.description: Name of template to add item prototype to. Required when I(host_name) is not used. Mutually exclusive with I(host_name).

fields.label: active since
fields.description: Time when the maintenance becomes active. The given value will be rounded down to minutes. Uses `datetime.datetime.now() if not specified. NOTE - This time will not update across multiple runs unless explicitly set.

fields.label: active till
fields.description: Time when the maintenance stops being active. The given value will be rounded down to minutes. Gets calculated from I(minutes) if not specified when using I(minutes) only. When using I(time_periods) defaults to one year from I(active_since)

fields.label: append
fields.description: Whether to append hosts and host groups to the existing maintenance.

fields.label: collect data
fields.description: Type of maintenance. With data collection, or without.

fields.label: desc
fields.description: Short description of maintenance window.

fields.label: host groups
fields.description: Host groups to manage maintenance window for. B(Required) option when I(state=present) and I(host_names) is not used.

fields.label: host names
fields.description: Hosts to manage maintenance window for. B(Required) option when I(state=present) and I(host_groups) is not used.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: minutes
fields.description: Length of maintenance window in minutes. Will default to 10 minutes if not explicitly set This argument has been B(DEPRECATED) and replaced by the I(time_periods) argument and will be removed in 4.0.0 B(Use of this argument only allows for the creation of a single one-time maintenance window.)

fields.label: name
fields.description: Unique name of maintenance window.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Create or remove a maintenance window. Maintenance window to remove is identified by name.

fields.label: visible name
fields.description: Type of zabbix host name to use for identifying hosts to include in the maintenance. I(visible_name=yes) to search by visible name,  I(visible_name=no) to search by technical name.

fields.label: data
fields.description: Graph written in DOT language.

fields.label: default image
fields.description: Name of the Zabbix image used to display the element if this element doesn't have the C(zbx_image) attribute defined.

fields.label: expand problem
fields.description: Whether the problem trigger will be displayed for elements with a single problem.

fields.label: height
fields.description: Height of the map.

fields.label: highlight
fields.description: Whether icon highlighting is enabled.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: label type
fields.description: Map element label type.

fields.label: margin
fields.description: Size of white space between map's borders and its elements.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the map.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the map. On C(present), it will create if map does not exist or update the map if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove the map if it exists.

fields.label: width
fields.description: Width of the map.

fields.label: attempt interval
fields.description: The interval between retry attempts. Possible range is 0-1h.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the media type.

fields.label: event menu
fields.description: Can be used when I(type=webhook). Includes entry in Event menu with link to created external ticket.

fields.label: event menu name
fields.description: Requred when I(event_menu=true). Event menu entry name.

fields.label: event menu url
fields.description: Requred when I(event_menu=true). Event menu entry underlying URL.

fields.label: gsm modem
fields.description: Serial device name of the gsm modem. Required when I(type=sms).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: max attempts
fields.description: The maximum number of attempts to send an alert. Possible range is 0-10.

fields.label: max sessions
fields.description: The maximum number of alerts that can be processed in parallel. Possible value is 1 when I(type=sms) and 0-100 otherwise.

fields.label: message format
fields.description: Can be used when I(type=email).

fields.label: message text limit
fields.description: The message text limit. Required when I(type=ez_texting). 160 characters for USA and 136 characters for Canada.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the media type.

fields.label: process tags
fields.description: Can be used when I(type=webhook). Process returned JSON property values as tags. These tags are added to the already existing (if any) problem event tags in Zabbix.

fields.label: script name
fields.description: The name of the executed script. Required when I(type=script).

fields.label: script params
fields.description: List of script parameters. Required when I(type=script).

fields.label: smtp authentication
fields.description: Whether SMTP authentication with username and password should be enabled or not. If set to C(true), C(username) and C(password) should be specified.

fields.label: smtp email
fields.description: Email address from which notifications will be sent. Required when I(type=email).

fields.label: smtp helo
fields.description: SMTP HELO. Required when I(type=email).

fields.label: smtp security
fields.description: SMTP connection security level to use.

fields.label: smtp server
fields.description: SMTP server host. Required when I(type=email).

fields.label: smtp server port
fields.description: SMTP server port. Required when I(type=email).

fields.label: smtp verify host
fields.description: SSL verify host for SMTP. Can be specified when I(smtp_security=STARTTLS) or I(smtp_security=SSL/TLS)

fields.label: smtp verify peer
fields.description: SSL verify peer for SMTP. Can be specified when I(smtp_security=STARTTLS) or I(smtp_security=SSL/TLS)

fields.label: state
fields.description: Desired state of the mediatype. On C(present), it will create a mediatype if it does not exist or update the mediatype if the associated data is different. On C(absent), it will remove the mediatype if it exists.

fields.label: status
fields.description: Whether the media type is enabled or no.

fields.label: type
fields.description: Type of the media type. Media types I(jabber) and I(ez_texting) works only with Zabbix versions 4.2 or older.

fields.label: webhook script
fields.description: Required when I(type=webhook). JavaScript code that will perform webhook operation. This code has access to all parameters in I(webhook_params). It may perform HTTP GET, POST, PUT and DELETE requests and has control over HTTP headers and request body. It may return OK status along with an optional list of tags and tag values or an error string.

fields.label: webhook timeout
fields.description: Can be used when I(type=webhook). Execution timeout for JavaScript code in I(webhook_script). Possible values are 1-60s.

fields.label: api hostname
fields.description: API hostname provided by the Duo authentication service. Required when C(method_type=duo_universal_prompt).

fields.label: client secret
fields.description: Client secret provided by the Duo authentication service. Required when C(method_type=duo_universal_prompt).

fields.label: clientid
fields.description: Client ID provided by the Duo authentication service. Required when C(method_type=duo_universal_prompt).

fields.label: code length
fields.description: Verification code length. Required when C(method_type=totp).

fields.label: hash function
fields.description: Type of the hash function for generating TOTP codes. Required when C(method_type=totp).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: method type
fields.description: A type of this MFA method

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of this MFA method

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of this MFA.

fields.label: address
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. IP address or DNS name to connect to. Required if the Zabbix proxy operating mode is passive

fields.label: allowed addresses
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Comma-delimited IP addresses or DNS names of active Zabbix proxy.

fields.label: ca cert
fields.description: Certificate issuer.

fields.label: custom timeouts
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Whether to override global item timeouts on the proxy level. 0 - use global settings; 1 - override timeouts.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the proxy.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: local address
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Address for active agents. IP address or DNS name to connect to. Required if proxy_groupid is not 0

fields.label: local port
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Local proxy port number to connect to. Supported if proxy_groupid is not 0

fields.label: operating mode
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Type of proxy.

fields.label: proxy address
fields.description: Deprecated for Zabbix version >= 7.0. Comma-delimited list of IP/CIDR addresses or DNS names to accept active proxy requests from. Requires I(status=active).

fields.label: proxy group
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Proxy group name.

fields.label: proxy name
fields.description: Name of the proxy in Zabbix.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the proxy. On C(present), it will create if proxy does not exist or update the proxy if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove a proxy if it exists.

fields.label: status
fields.description: Deprecated for Zabbix version >= 7.0. Type of proxy. (4 - active, 5 - passive)

fields.label: timeout browser
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on browser type checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout db monitor
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on DB checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout external check
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on external checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout http agent
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on HTTPagent checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout script
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on script type checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout simple check
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on simple checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout snmp agent
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on SNMP agent checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout ssh agent
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on SSH checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout telnet agent
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on Telnet checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Required if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: timeout zabbix agent
fields.description: Parameter introduced in Zabbix 7.0. Spend no more than this number of seconds on Zabbix agent checks processing. Accepts seconds or time unit with suffix (e.g., 30s, 1m). Possible values range: 1-600s. Rired if if C(custom_timeouts) is set to 1.

fields.label: tls accept
fields.description: Connections from proxy.

fields.label: tls connect
fields.description: Connections to proxy.

fields.label: tls psk
fields.description: The preshared key, at least 32 hex digits. Required if either I(tls_connect) or I(tls_accept) has PSK enabled.

fields.label: tls psk identity
fields.description: PSK identity. Required if either I(tls_connect) or I(tls_accept) has PSK enabled.

fields.label: tls subject
fields.description: Certificate subject.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the proxy group.

fields.label: failover delay
fields.description: Failover period for each proxy in the group to have online/offline state. Time suffixes are supported, e.g. 30s, 1m.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: min online
fields.description: Minimum number of online proxies required for the group to be online. Possible values range: 1-1000.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the proxy group.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the proxy group. On C(present), it will create if proxy group does not exist or update it if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove the proxy group if it exists.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: proxy hosts
fields.description: Also return list of hosts monitored by the proxy.

fields.label: proxy name
fields.description: Name of the Zabbix proxy.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of this regular expression

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the regular expression.

fields.label: test string
fields.description: A test string for this regular expression

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of this regular expression

fields.label: authtype
fields.description: Authentication method used for SSH script type. Used if type is C(ssh).

fields.label: command
fields.description: Command to run. Required when state is 'present'

fields.label: confirmation
fields.description: Confirmation pop up text. The pop up will appear when trying to run the script from the Zabbix frontend. Used if scope is C(manual_host_action) or C(manual_event_action).

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the script.

fields.label: execute on
fields.description: Where to run the script. Used if type is C(script).

fields.label: host access
fields.description: Host permissions needed to run the script. Used if scope is C(manual_host_action) or C(manual_event_action).

fields.label: host group
fields.description: host group name that the script can be run on. If set to "all", the script will be available on all host groups.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: menu path
fields.description: Folders separated by slash that form a menu like navigation in frontend when clicked on host or event. Used if scope is C(manual_host_action) or C(manual_event_action).

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the script.

fields.label: new window
fields.description: Should URL be opened in a new window? Only available if script_type is C(url)

fields.label: privatekey
fields.description: Name of the private key file used for SSH scripts with public key authentication. Used if type is C(ssh) and authtype is C(public_key).

fields.label: publickey
fields.description: Name of the public key file used for SSH scripts with public key authentication. Used if type is C(ssh) and authtype is C(public_key).

fields.label: scope
fields.description: Script scope.

fields.label: script timeout
fields.description: Webhook script execution timeout in seconds. Time suffixes are supported, e.g. 30s, 1m. Required if type is C(webhook). Possible values: 1-60s.

fields.label: script type
fields.description: Script type. Required when state is 'present'. A value of 'url' is only available in 7.0 or later

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the script.

fields.label: url
fields.description: The URL for quick access Required if script_type is C(url) Only available if script_type is C(url)

fields.label: user group
fields.description: user group name that will be allowed to run the script. If set to "all", the script will be available for all user groups. Used if scope is C(manual_host_action) or C(manual_event_action).

fields.label: user input default input
fields.description: Default user input Available if user_input_type is C(regex) Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: user input enabled
fields.description: Allow advanced user input configuration Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: user input list
fields.description: A list of possible choices for the user. Required if user_input_type is C(dropdown). NOTE the first option will be the default. Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: user input prompt
fields.description: Prompt to display when user input is enabled Required when user_input_enabled is C(True) Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: user input regex
fields.description: A regular expression to validate user input Required if user_input_type is C(regex) Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: user input type
fields.description: Choosing 'regex' allows the use of a regular expression Choosing 'dropdown' allows a pre-defined list of choices Required if user_input_enabled is C(true) Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.

fields.label: algorithm
fields.description: Status calculation rule. Only applicable if child services exists.  - C(status_to_ok), set status to OK with  - C(most_crit_if_all_children), most critical if all children have problems  - C(most_crit_of_child_serv), most critical of child services with

fields.label: children
fields.description: Child services to be linked to the service.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the service.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of Zabbix service

fields.label: parents
fields.description: Parent services to be linked to the service.

fields.label: propagation rule
fields.description: Status propagation value. Must be set together with propagation_rule. C(as_is) propagate service status as is - without any changes C(increase) increase the propagated status by a given propagation_value (by 1 to 5 severities) C(decrease) decrease the propagated status by a given propagation_value (by 1 to 5 severities) C(ignore) ignore this service - the status is not propagated to the parent service at all C(fixed) set fixed service status using a given propagation_value Required with C(propagation_value)

fields.label: propagation value
fields.description: Status propagation value. Must be set together with propagation_rule. Possible values when I(propagation_rule=as_is or ignore):  - C(not_classified) Possible values when I(propagation_rule=increase or decrease):  - C(information)  - C(warning)  - C(average)  - C(high)  - C(disaster) Possible values when I(propagation_rule=fixed):  - C(ok)  - C(not_classified)  - C(information)  - C(warning)  - C(average)  - C(high)  - C(disaster) Required with C(propagation_rule)

fields.label: sortorder
fields.description: Position of the service used for sorting.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State: present - create/update service; absent - delete service.

fields.label: weight
fields.description: Service weight.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: service name
fields.description: Name of the Zabbix service.

fields.label: alert usrgrp
fields.description: A name of user group which user belongs to receive an alerm message when database down.

fields.label: auditlog enabled
fields.description: Enable audit logging if C(true).

fields.label: auditlog mode
fields.description: Enable logging of system actions (changes by low-level discovery, network discovery and autoregistration) if C(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: blink period
fields.description: A time of period for blinking status changed triggers. Accepts seconds and time unit with suffix (e.g. 5m).

fields.label: connect timeout
fields.description: A time of connection timeout with Zabbix server.

fields.label: custom color
fields.description: Custom event color settings will be activated if C(true).

fields.label: default inventory mode
fields.description: A default value for host inventory mode.

fields.label: default lang
fields.description: Default language for users.

fields.label: default theme
fields.description: Default theme for users.

fields.label: default timezone
fields.description: Default time zone for users. Please set C(system) if you want to use system time zone.

fields.label: discovery group
fields.description: A hostgroup which discovered hosts will belong to.

fields.label: frontend url
fields.description: A URL of frontend. This parameter is used for url parameter of settings API.

fields.label: geomaps attribution
fields.description: A text of Geomap attribution.

fields.label: geomaps max zoom
fields.description: Max zoom level of geomap.

fields.label: geomaps tile provider
fields.description: A provider of Geomap tile. Please set C(another) if you want use non default provider

fields.label: geomaps tile url
fields.description: A URL of geomap tile.

fields.label: history period
fields.description: Max period of displaying history data. Accepts seconds and time unit with suffix (e.g. 24h).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: iframe sandboxing enabled
fields.description: The Zabbix uses iframe sandboxing if C(true).

fields.label: iframe sandboxing exceptions
fields.description: A text of iframe sandboxing exceptions.

fields.label: item test timeout
fields.description: A time of network timeout for item tests.

fields.label: login attempts
fields.description: A number of login attempts you can try with non blocked.

fields.label: login block
fields.description: A time of interval to reset login attempts when the user is blocked. Accepts seconds and time unit with suffix (e.g. 5m).

fields.label: max in table
fields.description: Max count of elements to show inside table cell

fields.label: max overview table size
fields.description: Max number of columns and rows in overview tables

fields.label: max period
fields.description: Max period for time filter. Accepts seconds and time unit with suffix (e.g. 1y).

fields.label: media type test timeout
fields.description: A time of network timeout for media type test.

fields.label: ok ack color
fields.description: A custom color for acknowledged RESOLVED events. This setting will be activated if I(custom_color=true). Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: ok ack style
fields.description: Acknowledged RESOLVED events blink if C(true).

fields.label: ok period
fields.description: A time of period for displaying OK triggers. Accepts seconds and time unit with suffix (e.g. 5m).

fields.label: ok unack color
fields.description: A custom color for unacknowledged RESOLVED events. This setting will be activated if I(custom_color=true). Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: ok unack style
fields.description: Unacknowledged RESOLVED events blink if C(true).

fields.label: period default
fields.description: Default period value for time filter. Accepts seconds and time unit with suffix (e.g. 1h).

fields.label: problem ack color
fields.description: A custom color for acknowledged PROBLEM events. This setting will be activated if I(custom_color=true). Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: problem ack style
fields.description: Acknowledged PROBLEM events blink if C(true).

fields.label: problem unack color
fields.description: A custom color for unacknowledged PROBLEM events. This setting will be activated if I(custom_color=true). Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: problem unack style
fields.description: Unacknowledged PROBLEM events blink if C(true).

fields.label: report test timeout
fields.description: A time of network timeout for scheduled report test.

fields.label: script timeout
fields.description: A time of network timeout for script execution.

fields.label: search limit
fields.description: A number of search and filter results limit.

fields.label: server check interval
fields.description: The Zabbix shows "Zabbix server is down" warning if C(true).

fields.label: severity color 0
fields.description: A custom color for not classified severity. Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: severity color 1
fields.description: A custom color for information severity. Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: severity color 2
fields.description: A custom color for warning severity. Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: severity color 3
fields.description: A custom color for average severity. Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: severity color 4
fields.description: A custom color for high severity. Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: severity color 5
fields.description: A custom color for disaster severity. Please set hexadecimal color code (e.g. 00FF00).

fields.label: severity name 0
fields.description: A custom name for not classified severity.

fields.label: severity name 1
fields.description: A custom name for information severity.

fields.label: severity name 2
fields.description: A custom name for warning severity.

fields.label: severity name 3
fields.description: A custom name for average severity.

fields.label: severity name 4
fields.description: A custom name for high severity.

fields.label: severity name 5
fields.description: A custom name for disaster severity.

fields.label: show technical errors
fields.description: The Zabbix shows PHP and SQL technical errors to users who are non-Super admin or belong to user groups with debug mode not enabled if C(true).

fields.label: snmptrap logging
fields.description: Logging unmatched SNMP traps will be ebabled if C(true).

fields.label: socket timeout
fields.description: A time of network default timeout.

fields.label: timeout browser
fields.description: A time of browser timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout db monitor
fields.description: A time of db monitor timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout external check
fields.description: A time of external check timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout http agent
fields.description: A time of HTTP agent timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout script
fields.description: A time of script timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout simple check
fields.description: A time of simple check timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout snmp agent
fields.description: A time of SNMP agent timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout ssh agent
fields.description: A time of SSH agent timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout telnet agent
fields.description: A time of telnet agent timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: timeout zabbix agent
fields.description: A time of zabbix agent timeout. This parameter is available since Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: uri valid schemes
fields.description: A list of valid URI scheme.

fields.label: validate uri schemes
fields.description: Validate URI schemes if C(true).

fields.label: vault provider
fields.description: A name of vault provider. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.2.

fields.label: work period
fields.description: Working time setting. U(https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/current/en/manual/appendix/time_period)

fields.label: x frame options
fields.description: A text of X-Frame-Options of HTTP header.

fields.label: clear templates
fields.description: List of template names to be unlinked and cleared from the template. This option is ignored if template is being created for the first time.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: link templates
fields.description: List of template names to be linked to the template. Templates that are not specified and are linked to the existing template will be only unlinked and not cleared from the template.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Required state of the template. On C(state=present) template will be created/imported or updated depending if it is already present. On C(state=absent) template will be deleted.

fields.label: template groups
fields.description: List of template groups to add template to when template is created. Replaces the current template groups the template belongs to if the template is already present. Required when creating a new template with C(state=present) and I(template_name) is used. Not required when updating an existing template.

fields.label: template json
fields.description: JSON dump of templates to import. Multiple templates can be imported this way. Mutually exclusive with I(template_name) and I(template_xml) and I(template_yaml).

fields.label: template name
fields.description: Name of Zabbix template. Required when I(template_json) or I(template_xml) are not used. Mutually exclusive with I(template_json) and I(template_xml).

fields.label: template xml
fields.description: XML dump of templates to import. Multiple templates can be imported this way. Mutually exclusive with I(template_name) and I(template_json) and I(template_yaml).

fields.label: template yaml
fields.description: Context of exported templates file to import. Multiple templates can be imported this way. Mutually exclusive with I(template_name) and I(template_json) and I(template_xml).

fields.label: all templategroups
fields.description: return info about all templategroups.

fields.label: format
fields.description: Format to use when dumping template.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: omit date
fields.description: Removes the date field for the dumped template This parameter will be ignored since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: template name
fields.description: Name of the template in Zabbix.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: state
fields.description: Create or delete template group.

fields.label: template groups
fields.description: List of template groups to create or delete.

fields.label: description
fields.description: Description of the token.

fields.label: expires at
fields.description: A timestamp of the token will be expired. The token will never expire if C(0)

fields.label: generate token
fields.description: New token string will be generated if C(true).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the token.

fields.label: state
fields.description: Create or delete token.

fields.label: status
fields.description: Status of the token.

fields.label: desc
fields.description: Additional description of the trigger. Overrides "comments" in API docs.

fields.label: host name
fields.description: Name of host to add trigger to. Required when I(template_name) is not used. Mutually exclusive with I(template_name).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of trigger to create or delete. Overrides "description" in API docs. Cannot be changed. If a trigger's name needs to be changed, it needs to deleted and recreated

fields.label: state
fields.description: Create or delete trigger.

fields.label: template name
fields.description: Name of template to add trigger to. Required when I(host_name) is not used. Mutually exclusive with I(host_name).

fields.label: desc
fields.description: Additional description of the trigger prototype. Overrides "comments" in API docs.

fields.label: host name
fields.description: Name of host to add trigger prototype to. Required when I(template_name) is not used. Mutually exclusive with I(template_name).

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of trigger prototype to create or delete. Overrides "description" in API docs. Cannot be changed. If a trigger prototype's name needs to be changed, it needs to deleted and recreated

fields.label: state
fields.description: Create or delete trigger prototype.

fields.label: template name
fields.description: Name of template to add trigger prototype to. Required when I(host_name) is not used. Mutually exclusive with I(host_name).

fields.label: after login url
fields.description: URL of the page to redirect the user to after logging in.

fields.label: autologin
fields.description: Whether to enable auto-login. If enable autologin, cannot enable autologout.

fields.label: autologout
fields.description: User session life time in seconds. If set to 0, the session will never expire. If enable autologout, cannot enable autologin.

fields.label: current passwd
fields.description: Current password for the user when overriding its password. Required when overriding the logged in user's password. https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/6.4/en/manual/api/reference/user/update

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: lang
fields.description: Language code of the user's language.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the user.

fields.label: override passwd
fields.description: Override password for the user. Password will not be updated on subsequent runs without setting this value to yes.

fields.label: passwd
fields.description: User's password. Required unless all of the I(usrgrps) are set to use LDAP as frontend access.

fields.label: refresh
fields.description: Automatic refresh period in seconds.

fields.label: role name
fields.description: User's role. Default is C(User role) when creating a new user. The default value will be removed at the version 2.0.0.

fields.label: rows per page
fields.description: Amount of object rows to show per page.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the user. On C(present), it will create if user does not exist or update the user if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove a user if it exists.

fields.label: surname
fields.description: Surname of the user.

fields.label: theme
fields.description: User's theme.

fields.label: timezone
fields.description: User's time zone. For the full list of supported time zones please refer to U(https://www.php.net/manual/en/timezones.php)

fields.label: usrgrps
fields.description: User groups to add the user to. Required when I(state=present).

fields.label: base dn
fields.description: LDAP base distinguished name string. required if C(idp_type) is set to I(ldap).

fields.label: bind dn
fields.description: LDAP bind distinguished name string. Can be empty for anonymous binding.

fields.label: bind password
fields.description: LDAP bind password. Can be empty for anonymous binding.

fields.label: description
fields.description: User directory description.

fields.label: encrypt assertions
fields.description: SAML encrypt assertions. Encrypts if I(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: encrypt nameid
fields.description: SAML encrypt name ID. Encrypts if I(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: group basedn
fields.description: LDAP groups path in LDAP tree to search for groups data. Used to configure user membership check in I(openLDAP). Required if group_membership is not set. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: group filter
fields.description: LDAP search filter to select groups when searching for specific user groups. Used to configure user membership check in openLDAP. Ignored when provisioning a user if group_membership is set. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: group member
fields.description: LDAP tree attribute name containing group name received with C(group_filter) query. Used to configure user membership check in openLDAP. Ignored when provisioning a user if group_membership is set. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: group membership
fields.description: LDAP property containing groups of user. E.g. I(memberOf) This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: group name
fields.description: LDAP/SAML attribute name to get group name for group mapping between Zabbix and IdP. Used to configure user membership check in LDAP. Ignored when provisioning a user if group_membership is set. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: idp entityid
fields.description: SAML URI that identifies the IdP in SAML messages. required if C(idp_type) is set to I(saml). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: idp type
fields.description: Type of IdP. Only one user directory of type SAML can exist. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Unique name of the user directory.

fields.label: nameid format
fields.description: SAML SP name ID format. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: provision status
fields.description: User directory provisioning status. if I(false) Provisioning of users created by this user directory is disabled if I(true) Provisioning of users created by this user directory is enabled. Additionally, the authentication status of C(ldap_jit_status) or C(saml_jit_status) should be enabled. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: scim status
fields.description: Whether the SCIM provisioning for SAML is enabled or disabled. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: search attribute
fields.description: LDAP attribute name to identify user by username in Zabbix database. required if C(idp_type) is set to I(ldap).

fields.label: search filter
fields.description: LDAP custom filter string when authenticating user in LDAP. Supported search_filter placeholders I(%{attr}) search attribute name (uid, sAMAccountName); I(%{user}) username value.

fields.label: sign assertions
fields.description: SAML sign assertions. Signs if I(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: sign authn requests
fields.description: SAML sign AuthN requests. Signs if I(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: sign logout requests
fields.description: SAML sign logout requests. Signs if I(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: sign logout responses
fields.description: SAML sign logout responses. Signs if I(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: sign messages
fields.description: SAML sign messages. Signs if I(true). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: slo url
fields.description: SAML IdP service endpoint URL to which Zabbix will send SAML logout requests. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: sp entityid
fields.description: SAML SP entity ID. required if C(idp_type) is set to I(saml). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: sso url
fields.description: SAML URL of the IdP"s SAML SSO service, to which Zabbix will send SAML authentication requests. required if C(idp_type) is set to I(saml). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: start tls
fields.description: LDAP startTLS option. It cannot be used with ldaps:// protocol hosts.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the user directory. On C(present), it will create if user directory does not exist or update it if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove the user directory if it exists.

fields.label: user lastname
fields.description: LDAP/SAML attribute name to use for users.surname field when user is provisioned This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: user ref attr
fields.description: LDAP user object attribute name. Will be set instead of the placeholder I(%{ref}) in c(group_filter) string. This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: user username
fields.description: LDAP/SAML attribute name to use for users.name field when user is provisioned This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: username attribute
fields.description: SAML username attribute to be used in comparison with Zabbix user.username value when authenticating. required if C(idp_type) is set to I(saml). This parameter is available since Zabbix 6.4.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the role to be processed

fields.label: rules
fields.description: Rules set as defined in https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/current/en/manual/api/reference/role/object#role-rules

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the user_role. On C(present), it will create if user_role does not exist or update the user_role if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove a user_role if it exists.

fields.label: type
fields.description: User type.

fields.label: debug mode
fields.description: Whether debug mode is enabled or disabled.

fields.label: gui access
fields.description: Frontend authentication method of the users in the group. Possible values: default -  use the system default authentication method; internal - use internal authentication; LDAP - use LDAP authentication; disable - disable access to the frontend.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the user group to create, update or delete.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the user group. On C(present), it will create if user group does not exist or update the user group if the associated data is different. On C(absent) will remove a user group if it exists.

fields.label: status
fields.description: Whether the user group is enabled or disabled.

fields.label: userdirectory
fields.description: Authentication user directory when gui_access set to LDAP or System default. For => Zabbix 7.0

fields.label: host name
fields.description: Name of host to add value map to.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the value map.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the value map. On C(present), it will create a value map if it does not exist or update the value map if the associated data is different. On C(absent), it will remove the value map if it exists.

fields.label: host name
fields.description: Name of the Zabbix host.

fields.label: http login password
fields.description: Basic Auth password

fields.label: http login user
fields.description: Basic Auth login

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the Zabbix valuemap.
